title: syringa × chinensis var. dubia
intro: Syringa × chinensis var. dubia, also known as the Chinese lilac, is a hybrid plant derived from the Syringa chinensis species. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Syringa × chinensis var. dubia can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
